appraisal_events.evidence: me laissant charmé par la vivacité familière avec laquelle, me prenant à la fois pour maître et pour complice...
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator explicitly registers charm and approval at Albertine’s lively, intimate wit and complicity; her closing reply (“Ce serait un beau malheur”) sustains this intimate, receptive tone.

status_effects.explanation: Albertine is locally elevated through the narrator’s explicit admiration of her familiar vivacity and quickness.
Her receptive answer to the prospect of a kiss signals mutual openness, improving her immediate affective position in the scene.
